name: great-minds
description: 14 legendary personas (Jobs, Musk, Buffett, Ive, Hamilton, Angelou, Rubin, Huang, Winfrey, Rhimes, Blakely, Aurelius, Jackson, Sorkin) plus structured debate, board review, and planning skills.
long_description: Channel first-principles thinking from Jobs, Musk, Buffett, and more. Run structured 2-round debates to lock strategic decisions. Spawn parallel board reviews from 4 perspectives. Generate atomic task plans with dependency waves. Every tool returns a structured prompt — Claude does the reasoning using your own subscription, no API key or hosting needed.

tools.name: persona_critique
tools.description: Get a critique from one of 14 legendary personas (steve-jobs, elon-musk, jony-ive, rick-rubin, warren-buffett, jensen-huang, oprah-winfrey, shonda-rhimes, sara-blakely, maya-angelou, aaron-sorkin, margaret-hamilton, marcus-aurelius, phil-jackson). Returns a structured prompt for Claude to role-play that persona.

tools.name: debate
tools.description: Run a structured 2-round debate between Steve Jobs and Elon Musk on a topic or PRD, with a Rick Rubin essence distillation at the end. Returns a 3-step prompt sequence.

tools.name: board_review
tools.description: Spawn 4 board members (Jensen Huang, Oprah Winfrey, Warren Buffett, Shonda Rhimes) to review a topic from strategic, audience, business, and retention angles in parallel. Returns a consolidated review prompt.

tools.name: plan
tools.description: Generate a structured task plan from a requirement or PRD. Produces atomic XML task cards organized into dependency waves with verification checks.

tools.name: list_personas
tools.description: List all 14 available personas with a one-line description of each.

tools.name: brain_save
tools.description: Commit a file (debate round, board verdict, persona critique, shared note) to the team's shared brain GitHub repo. Requires env vars GREAT_MINDS_GITHUB_TOKEN and GREAT_MINDS_GITHUB_REPO.

tools.name: brain_load
tools.description: Fetch and return the decoded content of a file from the shared brain GitHub repo.

tools.name: brain_list
tools.description: List files in a directory of the shared brain GitHub repo.
